_comment_1: Hand-rated quality scores for each curated suggestion in src/llm/mock.py.
_comment_2: Rubric: 3 = Actionable (copy-paste fix works), 2 = Pointed (right area, fix needs adjustment), 1 = Misleading (wrong direction).
_comment_3: Value is a LIST — one score per suggestion, in declaration order. List length must equal the number of suggestions in mock.py for that key.
